forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 58. West wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As evening settles over Boston, a tranquil calm blankets the city, with the light of the setting sun giving way to a clear and crisp night sky. With temperatures gently easing down to the low fiftys, the West wind whispers softly at six to ten miles per hour, occasionally invigorated by brisk gusts that recall the freshness of early spring. Although the night may hold whispers of impending rain, it is merely a fleeting presence, promised to be less than a hint upon the ground.

Tomorrow promises to deliver an inviting warmth, as the sun rises to embrace the city in rays of golden light, nudging temperatures towards a mild seventy-nine. It is a day that beckons adventure, encouraging strolls through cobblestone streets or perhaps a leisurely visit to a quiet café where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee mingles with the chatter of morning routines. As one navigates the day, consider donning light layers to accommodate the gentle warmth of midday and a light jacket for the cooler embrace of the evening air, perfectly complimenting the refreshing breeze that will accompany you. This is an unassuming but delightful time in Boston—an opportune moment to savor the simple pleasures of life, whether that be a book read on a park bench or a pleasant walk along the riverbank.
